arts.ttl: Preview: Bolton Wanderers vs. Bristol Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Bolton Wanderers and Bristol Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Bolton ended their three-match losing run in dramatic style on Tuesday after beating rivals Wigan in stoppage-time to move into the top six. The Trotters have generally performed well at home in rece...
